_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of training data integrity risks, including data poisoning attack vectors, supply chain contamination, label manipulation, and the detection and prevention methods for each.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Knowledge SP-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-006 (RC, cosine: 0.507), SP-K-005 (SP, cosine: 0.467).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.582). Shared vocabulary: [data, knowledge, methods]. NICE-only terms [sanitization] vs WIDAI-only terms [attack, chain, contamination, detection, integrity, label] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.892 (P=0.911, R=0.874). P exceeds R by 0.037 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of data sanitization methods" and "Knowledge of training data integrity risks, including data poisoning attack vect" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.587 ≈ STS 0.582 (gap 0.005). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, knowledge, methods] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.4%. Shared tokens: [data, knowledge, methods]. NICE-only: [sanitization]. WIDAI-only: [attack, chain, contamination, detection, integrity, label].
